Founded in 1986 by a consortium of local banks, it aims to establish the debit network and drive the adoption of electronic payments in Singapore. It is owned by DBS Bank, OCBC Bank and United Overseas Bank (UOB).The NETS Group (comprising NETS, BCS and BCSIS) provides a full suite of payments and financial processing services including direct debit and credit payments at point-of-sale (NETS) and online (eNETS), mobile payments (NETSPay), card services (CashCard, FlashPay card), electronic funds transfer (FAST, PayNow, GIRO) and payment and clearing services (Real-Time Gross Settlement, Cheque Truncation System). NETS is also a member of the Asian Payment Network (APN) and a council member of UnionPay International.", "title": "NETS (company)", "url": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/NETS_(company)"}, {"snippet": "Nexus is a Brazilian company specializing in research and data intelligence, part of FSB Holding. It offers services including public opinion research (pesquisa de opini\u00e3o), brand reputation studies (pesquisa de reputa\u00e7\u00e3o de marca), and media dat\u2026", "title": "Nexus (Brazilian company)", "url": "https://grokipedia.com/page/Nexus_Brazilian_company"}], "status": "success"}', success=True, duration_ms=8270.494700060226), ToolCall(tool_name='search', tool_input='{"query": "Girlfriends brand"}', tool_output='{"results": [{"snippet": "Freaks and Geeks is an American teen comedy-drama television series created by Paul Feig and executive-produced by Judd Apatow that aired on NBC from September 25, 1999, to July 8, 2000. Three episodes were left unaired by NBC, and the episodes were first broadcast in September and October 2000 on Fox Family Channel. The show is set in a suburban high school near Detroit during 1980\u201381. The theme of Freaks and Geeks reflects \"the sad, hilarious unfairness of teen life\". With little success when it first aired, because of an erratic episode schedule and conflicts between the creators and NBC, the series was canceled after airing 15 out of the 18 episodes. The series\u2013which launched most of its young actors' careers\u2013starred Linda Cardellini, John Francis Daley, James Franco, Samm Levine, Seth Rogen, Jason Segel, Martin Starr, Busy Philipps, Becky Ann Baker, and Joe Flaherty.The series became a cult classic, and Apatow continued the show's legacy by incorporating the actors in future productions. It appeared in numerous lists of the greatest television shows of all time, including lists by Time, Entertainment Weekly, TV Guide, Rolling Stone and Variety.", "title": "Girlfriends and Boyfriends (Freaks and Geeks episode)", "url": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Girlfriends_and_Boyfriends_(Freaks_and_Geeks_episode)"}], "status": "success"}', success=True, duration_ms=8351.764599909075)], llm_calls=[LLMCallMetadata(model_id='bedrock/nvidia.nemotron-nano-9b-v2', prompt_tokens=369, completion_tokens=1375, total_tokens=1744, token_usage_known=True, cost_usd=0.00033839, cost_type='actual', latency_ms=11048.859599977732, provider='bedrock'), LLMCallMetadata(model_id='bedrock/nvidia.nemotron-nano-9b-v2', prompt_tokens=1056, completion_tokens=387, total_tokens=1443, token_usage_known=True, cost_usd=0.00015236999999999998, cost_type='actual', latency_ms=3675.46289996244, provider='bedrock'), LLMCallMetadata(model_id='bedrock/nvidia.nemotron-nano-9b-v2', prompt_tokens=1458, completion_tokens=1312, total_tokens=2770, token_usage_known=True, cost_usd=0.00038924, cost_type='actual', latency_ms=10969.75950000342, provider='bedrock')])], total_reward=0.0, episode_outcome='failure', num_steps=1, total_tokens=5957, known_cost_usd=0.0008799999999999999, has_missing_cost_data=False, cost_data_coverage=1.0, total_cost_usd=0.0008799999999999999)
instructions:
You are a multi-hop question answerer with access to a web search tool.

How to respond on each turn, pick exactly ONE of:

1. Call the `search` tool to look up evidence. The `query` argument must
   be a focused keyword phrase targeting the specific fact you need next.
   Example tool call:
     {"tool": "search", "arguments": {"query": "founding year Medici Bank Giovanni di Bicci"}}

2. Commit your final answer by responding with ONLY \boxed{...}, nothing
   else. Example: \boxed{Florence}

Never mix these two modes in a single response.

For multi-hop questions, break the question into sub-questions and issue
one focused search per sub-question. Only commit an answer once the
retrieved evidence directly supports it.
